Test Description: Configures DMA descriptors for 8 channels, enables per-channel DMA interrupts and top-level system interrupt, triggers transfers via debug instructions, waits for interrupt after each trigger, then runs data_integrity check and finishes with the returned status.
Remarks:
IRQ path is compile-time selected: MPS_DMA enables GIC IRQ 0x7 and writes 0x80 to MIZAR_MPS_SYSREG_INTR_EN; APS_DMA enables GIC IRQ 0x17 and writes 0x80 to MIZAR_APS_SYSREG_INTR_EN.
Source/Destination/Descriptor addresses are defined per channel via macros in this file.
A commented-out polling path using MIZAR_DMA_INTMIS exists but is not executed.
Test Steps / Procedure:
Entry point: test_case()
1) Global init: fail = 0
2) Compute iter = DATA_LEN_IN_BYTES / (SRC_BURST * (SRC_SIZE_IN_BITS/8))
3) Initialize arrays src_addr[0..7], dst_addr[0..7], desc_addr[0..7], desc_addr_actual[0..7] with per-channel macros
-- Conditional IRQ/system enable (compile-time):
4a) If MPS_DMA is defined: CALL GIC_EnableIRQ(0x7)
5a) If MPS_DMA is defined: WRITE register MIZAR_MPS_SYSREG_INTR_EN = 0x80
4b) Else if APS_DMA is defined: CALL GIC_EnableIRQ(0x17)
5b) Else if APS_DMA is defined: WRITE register MIZAR_APS_SYSREG_INTR_EN = 0x80
-- Descriptor memory initialization loop:
6) For j = 0 .. 7: CALL initialize_memory(desc_addr[i])  // as coded, uses i-index in the call
-- Test start log:
7) CALL printf(Inside Testcase\n")

Index: -- Descriptor programming and enable per channel:
8.13) MODIFY-WRITE register MIZAR_DMA_INTEN = (previous_value | (0x00000001 << i))  // enable interrupt per channel i
-- Issue debug commands and wait for interrupt per channel:

Memory Start Offset:
- Acceptance is determined solely by the argument passed to finish(fail) at the end of test_case().
- For each i = 0..7, the function data_integrity(src_addr[i], dst_addr[i], DATA_LEN_IN_BYTES) is called and its return value is assigned to the variable 'fail'.
- Final PASS criterion: finish(fail) is invoked with fail == 0.
- Final FAIL criterion: finish(fail) is invoked with fail != 0.
